# Bridger Western Wiki

> Complete wiki and survival guide for Bridger Western, a Roblox survival game set in Ridge B Valley. Covers Stands, Weapons, Cards, acquisition methods, tier rankings, clan coordination, and survival mechanics for the 2026 Alpha version.

## Site Information

- **URL**: https://bridgerwestern.cc/
- **Type**: Game Wiki & Guide
- **Game**: Bridger Western (Roblox)
- **Last Updated**: 2026-04-05
- **Content**: Stands, Weapons, Cards, Guides, Tier Lists

## Available Content

- [Stands Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/): Complete Stand roster with tier rankings (S/A/B/Pending)
- [How to Get Stands](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/how-to-get-stand.html): Arrow Shard fishing (0.5% drop rate), Corpse Part KOTH events, water escape tactics, server selection
- [Stand Abilities](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-abilities.html): Complete moveset guide with all Stand skills, keybinds, special mechanics, and passive abilities
- [Stand Tier List](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-tier-list.html): S-tier (The World, D4C, Killer Queen), A-tier (TWAU, King Crimson, Star Platinum, SPTW), B-tier rankings
- [Corpse Part Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/corpse-part-guide.html): KOTH mechanics, probability system (15-20% success rate), body part types, survival tactics
- [Discord Coordination](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/discord-coordination.html): Clan strategies, server flooding methods, team coordination
- [Stands FAQ](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/faq.html): Common questions, troubleshooting, beginner mistakes, Tusk Acts abilities, Hey Ya buffs, PvP counters
- [Weapons Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/): Complete weapon guide with primary and secondary weapons, tier 3 dual wield system
- [Primary Weapons](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/primary-weapons.html): 9 primary weapons including Taurus .357, Winchester Repeater, Malcom .70, Bow with arrow switching
- [Secondary Weapons](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/secondary-weapons.html): 6 secondary weapons including Tommy Gun, DB Shotgun, Sabre, Colt Ocelot (requires Tier 3)
- [Weapon Mechanics](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/weapon-mechanics/): Tier 3 dual wield system, Stand penalty, revolver reload mechanics
- [Cards Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/): Complete Tarot Cards guide with all 25 cards, effects, and acquisition methods
- [All Cards](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/all-cards/): Complete list of all 25 Tarot Cards organized by category (Ranged, Melee, Mobility, High Risk, Special Abilities)
- [Card Builds](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/card-builds/): Optimized 3-card combinations for bow, gun, melee, and hybrid builds
- [How to Get Cards](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/how-to-get-cards/): Mud Witch location in Swamp, 150 Moola per roll, 3-card limit, reroll strategy

## Key Game Mechanics

- **Stand Acquisition**: Arrow Shard fishing (0.5%) or Corpse Part KOTH events (15-20% with holding)
- **Card Acquisition**: Mud Witch in Swamp, 150 Moola per roll, choose 1 from 3 random cards, 3-card maximum per character
- **Best Cards**: Archer's Child (bow builds), Desperado (gun builds), Free Runner (universal mobility), EXECUTIONER (headshot kills), Quick Draw (weapon swap)
- **Tusk**: Requires Left Arm Corpse Part (10% chance), causes permanent disability (crawl only, no weapons)
- **Tusk Acts**: Act 1 (Nail Glide + mini-gun spam), Act 2 (Homing bullets + ricochet + traps), Act 3 (Wormhole bullets + double damage)
- **Hey Ya**: Random buff system - dodge, damage, healing, speed, accuracy buffs
- **Water Method**: Escape tactic using water terrain to avoid players during Corpse Part events
- **Clan Monopoly**: S-tier Stands controlled by Discord clans, solo success rate ~5% vs clan 80%+
- **Tier 3 Dual Wield**: Cannot equip both primary and secondary weapons until reaching tier 3
- **Stand Penalty**: Having a Stand decreases base gun damages
- **Revolver Reloads**: Revolvers have wasteful reload mechanics (Taurus .357, Schofield 6, Whitney Dragoon, Colt Ocelot)
